tracks.target_customer: Consultants, agencies, CPA firms, advisory teams, and service businesses with recurring calls.
tracks.pain: Useful call details turn into scattered notes, missed follow-ups, and manual task entry.
tracks.offer: Audio or meeting recording to transcript, summary, follow-up draft, task checklist, and client-ready packet.
tracks.pricing_hypothesis: $300-$1,000/mo depending on monthly volume and review needs.
completed: Added public website card under Other Offerings.
Deployed the public site update to jvt-technologies.com.
tracks.next_validation_step: Build one synthetic demo from recorded audio into transcript, summary, email draft, and checklist.

tracks.target_customer: Solo and small professional offices that miss calls or repeat the same intake questions.
tracks.pain: Missed calls and weak intake notes slow follow-up and leak opportunities.
tracks.offer: Inbound AI intake that discloses itself, captures caller details, qualifies the request, and routes a review packet.
completed: Added public website card under Other Offerings.
Deployed the public site update to jvt-technologies.com.
tracks.next_validation_step: Turn the current dry-run voice agent into a public demo flow before selling live calling.

tracks.target_customer: Law, accounting, property management, staffing, and operations teams already experimenting with AI.
tracks.pain: Staff use AI, but outputs still require heavy cleanup, checking, and formatting.
tracks.offer: Convert ad hoc AI usage into repeatable workflows with inputs, review checkpoints, source checks, and handoff notes.
completed: Added public website card under Other Offerings.
Deployed the public site update to jvt-technologies.com.
tracks.next_validation_step: Create one outreach variant focused on AI cleanup and workflow reliability.

tracks.target_customer: Law firms, CPA firms, insurance offices, property teams, and admin-heavy service businesses.
tracks.pain: Shared inboxes mix client requests, attachments, notifications, and follow-ups without a clean task queue.
tracks.offer: Classify messages, extract attachment details, create tasks, and prepare draft replies for review.
completed: Added public website card under Other Offerings.
Deployed the public site update to jvt-technologies.com.
tracks.next_validation_step: Package JVT's own mailbox listener as an internal proof-of-work case study.

tracks.target_customer: Privacy-sensitive professional teams with client documents and cautious technology policies.
tracks.pain: Teams want AI search and drafting help but do not want sensitive files scattered across generic SaaS tools.
tracks.offer: Controlled retrieval assistant and workflow console on private cloud, Mac mini, mini-PC, or approved server path.
completed: Added public website card under Other Offerings.
Deployed the public site update to jvt-technologies.com.
tracks.next_validation_step: Package the M4 architecture as a short case study once the public site update is deployed.
